summary: All suites green (gofmt/vet/build/test -race, 9 packages). CLI hands-on: --help, nonexistent-slug refusal, acceptance-gate refusal (awaiting-uat + waiting-for-user), no-.gogo/ refusal, no-claude-on-PATH refusal — all correct, right exit codes. THE KEY e2e (stub-claude dry run, plan Tests D2) run manually across 3 scenarios (happy/warm-resume/is_error) and captured as a new hermetic Go test (cli/run_e2e_test.go, TestRunE2EStubClaude) exercising the real exec.Command("claude",...) boundary. 0 findings; done-bar met.
